name: Rinnosuke Mitobe
description: A hard working player who has never spoken in front of his team members. For some reason, Koganei can understand what's on his mind and then speaks for him. Mitobe is the eldest son in a really big family, with a lot of brothers and sisters. Mitobe is just as determined to win as the other players at Seirin, but unlike the others, he doesn't show his feelings that often. Most people know him as a quiet, hard worker. According to Riko, no one has ever heard Mitobe talk.

name: Sakuya
description: Leader of the Sylph race and an exceptional swordswoman. She was elected as the leader of the Sylph race by popular vote (80% voice of the vote). Her statistics are not very high due to her status as a Lord not allowing her to do much training. Despite her low stats, she is a formidable opponent in the Sylph dueling tournaments. ~!During a meeting with the Cait Sith, she is attacked by Salamanders led by General Eugene. At the same moment, Kirito flies in to challenge the intruder to a duel. Aft
mediaTitles: Sword Art Online the Movie: Ordinal Scale

name: Sayo
description: Ruri's childhood friend and Shin's little sister. Her parents died when she was little, but with the help of her neighbors she and her brother got by. Both of them have as much much talent for spirit arts as Ruri, and learned with her under Yuba's guidance.

name: Scheherazade
description: Scheherazade is one of the four Magi in the current era. It is revealed she has lived for over 200 years supporting the Reim Empire as a great priest. Her name is based from the Persian queen, Scheherazade who tells her stories to King Shahryar in "One Thousand and One Nights" stories. ~! In chapter 177 of the manga it is revealed that she, just like Titus, is actually a clone created by the real Scheherazade. The real magi Scheherazade is 268 years old and cannot walk anymore, she is resting so

name: Sora Mizusawa
description: __Height:__ 172 cm He is Chisato's gentle husband who rarely shows anger. He is responsible for the general housework at the Mizusawa household. He has worked in a bar and is familiar with cocktails. He is a furniture designer.
mediaTitles: Love is Like a Cocktail Episode 14
Osake wa Fuufu ni Natte kara

Osake wa Fuufu ni Natte kara

name: Sora Niimi
description: Sora is Kakeru's younger sister and a first-year student. She spends most of her spare time hanging out at the protagonist's apartment, often threatening to move in, and sometimes makes him treat her to dinner. She has a selfish side, but her dedication to her brother is undeniable. She enjoys teasing Miyako for her overly-serious demeanor, and also for her occasional slip-ups. When Sora awakens to her powers, she begins cooperating with Miyako and her brother on the investigation.

name: Sougetsu no Kyuuketsuki Vanitas
nativeName: 蒼月の吸血鬼　"ヴァニタス"
description: Vanitas of the Blue Moon is a vampire. According to legend, they were born under the Blue Moon and were the ostensible creator of the Book of Vanitas and the disease Malnomen. It was their intent to destroy vampires through the corruption of their True Name, hoping to take revenge for a lifetime of prosecution for their birth. This power would be passed onto their kin, prophesied to bring about the end of all vampires. (Source: Mochizuki Jun Wiki)
mediaTitles: The Case Study of Vanitas Part 2
searchTerms: 蒼月の吸血鬼　"ヴァニタス"
The Case Study of Vanitas Part 2

name: Souseiseki
description: The fourth Rozen Maiden doll, and Suiseiseki's tomboyish twin sister. As with Suiseiseki, she is a gardener that has the power to enter human dreams, and carries a set of pruning shears that she uses to tend humans' soul trees. She wields these in battle combined with acrobatic flight, her spirit Lempika and her hat which can be thrown and returns like a boomerang, a tactic she used to temporarily disarm Shinku in their second fight. She also has heterochromatic eyes like Suiseiseki, but the col

name: Starscream
description: Starscream is a Decepticon in the various fictional Transformers universes. He appeared in several incarnations in the related comics, animated television series, and movies. Most incarnations of the Starscream character are extremely ambitious and treacherous, but with varying degrees of strength and competence. Often, Starscream is the leader of a sub-group of Decepticon attack jets called the Seekers, and in many incarnations he is also second-in-command of the Decepticons. He makes no secret

name: Takumi Sakagami
description: A boy who avoids talking about his true feelings.

name: Tomoe Enjou
description: __Height:__ 158 cm In the middle of October 1998, he was attacked by bullies from his old school and saved by Ryougi Shiki. He asked her to hide him at her place and admitted that he had killed his parents because of constant dreams of getting killed by his mother. The origin that he has is "worthlessness".
mediaTitles: the Garden of sinners Chapter 5: Paradox Paradigm
Kara no Kyoukai Remix: Gate of seventh heaven

name: Tsukasa Nishino
description: Her idol-caliber face, fair hair, and straightforward personality make her very popular at school. With her looks, she attracts literally dozens of admirers but turns down each and every one. Flighty and hot-tempered at the start of the manga, she develops a far more mature attitude after entering Oumi Academy.

name: Umi Katou
description: Umi is the second cousin of Hairi Takahara who has lived her whole life in the city, but she always admired life in the countryside and it’s the reason why she has come to Torishirojima for the summer. During the summer, she often cooks for Hairi. Her specialty is fried rice; she's extremely passionate about fried rice. ~!She is the daughter of Hairi and Shiroha in the future.!~

name: Wrath
description: Wrath, formerly known as Sasajima Kyouya, is one of the students that reincarnated. After reincarnation, he found himself reborn as a Goblin in a Goblin Village with the special skill to create weapons. ~!He is the commander of the Demon Lord's eighth army.!~
mediaTitles: So I'm a Spider, So What?
So I'm a Spider, So What?
So I'm a Spider, So What?

name: Yuu Naruse
description: Yuu is Kuroki Tomoko's old friend from middle school. Back then she had rather average looks and average grades. After she entered high school she saw that everyone was being flashy and she felt out of place. Soon after, she started wearing contacts, bleached her hair and now looks all flashy and beautiful as well.

name: Yuuka Okkotsu
description: Granddaughter of Yuta Okkotsu and Maki Zenin. A Jujutsu Sorcerer in training, Yuuka wishes to show that she deserves the favor of her household.

name: Yuuki Hase
description: **Height:** 169.7 cm Yuuki Hase is a high school student who notices that his classmate Kaori Fujimiya is always alone. He endeavors to be her friend even after learning that she loses every memory of her friends each Monday. Hase's easily seen trait throughout the whole series is his apprehensiveness. Instances in the media have depicted Hase is hesitant and almost fearful of moving forward and taking the first step. He is also quite simple-minded, as he can be pleased and displeased by very se
mediaTitles: One Week Friends Kaori no Nikki
searchTerms: One Week Friends Kaori no Nikki

name: Alka
description: The village chief of Kunlun Village. She secretly has a crush on Lloyd and frequently teleports to the capital to check up on him. ~!While she resembles a twelve-year-old girl she is actually hundreds of years old, and an incredibly powerful magic user.!~ ~!She deliberately filled Lloyd's mind with stories of the army to convince him to leave.!~

name: Ana Coppola
description: Ana is an eleven-year-old girl who originally came from Cornwall, England, five years before the series, but seems to have forgotten how to speak English. She first pretends that she speaks only English, but it is not long before she is discovered by Matsuri while speaking very polite Japanese. Matsuri tries to help her re-learn English. Ana is often teased by Miu because of her name, Ana Coppola, which can be written in kanji to mean "hole", "bone", and "cave" (穴骨洞, "hole", "bone", and "cave"?)

name: Ange Yuki
description: Ange Yuki (結希 アンジュ, Yuki Anju) is a character in Visual Prison and a member of OZ. He is a dhampir. The protagonist. An awkward but strong-willed boy. Unable to adjust to his hometown, he leaves for Harajuku. He has loved music since he was a child and admires the songs of Guil from first generation ECLIPSE. In order to get to the bottom of things, he unconsciously goes into people's pockets.

name: Canaria  Easter
description: She came from a household of aristocrats that had no power.
